name: Dungeon Cell Escape
description: A prisoner wakes in a stone dungeon cell. A rusted iron key lies near the far wall. The locked door to the guard room is the only way out. The guard is asleep at his post.

atmosphere.lighting_mood: dim torchlight, deep shadows, warm amber
atmosphere.audio_palette: dripping water, distant chains, low wind hum

interactables.behaviour: A rusted iron key, cold to the touch. Glows faintly when the player is near.
Heavy oak door with an iron lock. Opens when the player carries the iron key and stands within 80cm.
interactables.audio_profile: locked hum, grinding creak on unlock, heavy thud when swings open

interactables.behaviour: Guard slumped at a table, snoring. Wakes and raises alarm if the player makes loud noise nearby.
interactables.audio_profile: deep snoring, startled shout if alerted

interactables.behaviour: The dungeon exit. Triggers scene completion when the player passes through.
interactables.audio_profile: ambient wind from outside, success chime on exit

objectives.description: Find the iron key hidden in the cell
Use the key to unlock the cell door
Reach the dungeon exit without waking the guard

narrative_states.name: Locked In
narrative_states.description: Player is trapped in the cell. The door is locked.

narrative_states.name: Door Open
narrative_states.description: Cell door is open. Guard room is accessible.

narrative_states.name: Alarm Raised
narrative_states.description: Guard is awake and pursuing the player.

narrative_states.name: Escaped
narrative_states.description: Player has reached the exit. Scene complete.

gm_hooks.name: Unlock Cell Door
gm_hooks.description: Force the cell door open (bypass key requirement)

gm_hooks.name: Wake the Guard
gm_hooks.description: Trigger the guard to wake and raise alarm
